gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/86)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/86)
text: قَالَ لِي أَ تَخْلُونَ وَ تَتَحَدَّثُونَ وَ تَقُولُونَ مَا شِئْتُمْ فَقُلْتُ إِي وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّا لَنَخْلُو وَ نَتَحَدَّثُ وَ نَقُولُ مَا شِئْنَا فَقَالَ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ لَوَدِدْتُ أَنِّي مَعَكُمْ فِي بَعْضِ تِلْكَ الْمَوَاطِنِ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ إِنِّي لَأُحِبُّ رِيحَكُمْ وَ أَرْوَاحَكُمْ وَ إِنَّكُمْ عَلَى دِينِ اللَّهِ وَ دِينِ مَلَائِكَتِهِ فَأَعِينُوا بِوَرَعٍ وَ اجْتِهَادٍ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Muskan, from Muyassar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said to me: ‘Are you isolating yourselves, and discussing and saying whatever you so desire to?’ So I said, ‘Yes, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! We do isolate ourselves, and we discuss, and we are saying whatever we so desire to’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I<sup>asws</sup> would love to be with you in one of those places. But, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, I<sup>asws</sup> loved your aromas, and your spirits, and you all are upon the Religion of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the Religion of His<sup>azwj</sup> Angels, therefore Assist with piety and the striving’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Muskan from Muyassir who has said the following: “Once abu Ja’far (a.s.) asked me, ‘Do you hold private gatherings wherein you say whatever you want?’ I said, ‘Yes, I swear by Allah, we hold private gatherings and say whatever we like to say (in praise of Muhammad and his family).’ The Imam said, ‘I swear by Allah, I wish I could be with you at such gatherings. I swear by Allah, I love your fragrance and your spirits. You, certainly, follow the religion of Allah, and the religion of the angels. Pay attention to restraining from the worldly attractions (sins) and assist yourselves with striving hard in work.’”
